title: AN ACT RENAMING THE BULACAN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL STATE COLLEGE (BNASC) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ILDEFONSO, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, AS THE BULACAN AGRICULTURAL STATE COLLEGE (BASC)

chunks.text:
H. No. 2473 / 100 OG No. 20, 3022 (May 17, 2004)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9249, February 19, 2004 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE BULACAN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL STATE COLLEGE (BNASC) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ILDEFONSO, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, AS THE BULACAN AGRICULTURAL STATE COLLEGE (BASC)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Bulacan National Agricultural State College (BNASC) in the Municipality of San Ildefonso, Province of Bulacan, is hereby renamed as the Bulacan Agricultural State College (BASC).

SEC. 2. All laws or decrees inconsistent with the provision of this Act are hereby deemed amended accordingly.

SEC. 2. All laws or decrees inconsistent with the provision of this Act are hereby deemed amended accordingly.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on

September 3, 2002 and November 24, 2003, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: FEB 19 2004

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
